nameEn: National Health Insurance Card — All Household Members (copy)
nameJa: 世帯全員分の国民健康保険被保険者証（写し）
conditionNote: Submit if currently enrolled in National Health Insurance (国民健康保険).
noteEn: Redact insurer number and insured person symbol/number before submitting.
noteJa: 保険者番号及び被保険者等記号・番号を黒塗りにして提出。
